chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 3968 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 18256/23. (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2023. Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocates for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for respondents along with Tariq Aziz, Principal Appraiser. Mr. G.M Bhutto, Assistant Attorney General. -------------- Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
